    E

    encrypt(byte[], SecretKey) - Method in class util.encryption.services.CipherCore

    Controller for the Encryption and Decryption UI.

    EncryptionService - Class in util.encryption.services.textServices
    Service for encrypting text using AES encryption.

    Creates an encryption service instance.

    Executes the file decryption process.

    Executes the file encryption process.

    Executes the decryption process.
    execute() - Method in class util.encryption.services.textServices.EncryptionService
    Executes the encryption process.
    execute() - Method in interface util.passwordCracker.services.AttackService
    Starts the attack process.

    Starts the brute-force attack process.

    Starts the dictionary attack process.

    Starts the port scanning process.

    Generates a hash from the given file.
    execute(String, String) - Static method in class util.hashGenerator.services.TextHashService
